system_configurations.name: RCCL-Tests-NET-IB-Transport
system_configurations.description: Comprehensive InfiniBand transport test config. Runs all NetIbMPITest tests including plugin API, physical device, and virtual device (vNIC) tests.

mpi_args.mellanox: --mca oob_tcp_if_include eth1 --mca btl_tcp_if_include eth1 --mca btl ^vader,openib --bind-to none
mpi_args.ainic: --mca oob_tcp_if_include eno0 --mca btl_tcp_if_include eno0 --mca btl ^vader,openib --bind-to none
mpi_args.thor2: --oversubscribe --mca plm_rsh_agent srun --mca oob_tcp_if_include eno8303 --mca btl_tcp_if_include eno8303 --mca btl ^openib --bind-to none

tests.name: NetIB_Init_Plugin
tests.description: Initialize InfiniBand network plugin and verify basic setup

tests.name: NetIB_Init_GetDeviceCount
tests.description: Query and validate InfiniBand device count

tests.name: NetIB_Props_GetProperties
tests.description: Query InfiniBand device properties and capabilities

tests.name: NetIB_Props_InvalidDevice
tests.description: Error handling when querying properties of invalid InfiniBand device

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_ListenAndConnect
tests.description: Basic listen/connect/accept handshake over IB

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_InvalidHandle
tests.description: Connect with invalid handle error handling

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_CloseWithoutWaiting
tests.description: Close connection without waiting for transfer completion

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_MultipleSequential
tests.description: Multiple sequential listen/connect/close cycles

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_ListenCloseListen
tests.description: Close listener mid-handshake and re-listen on same port

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_MultipleSimultaneousListens
tests.description: Multiple concurrent listeners on different handles

tests.name: NetIB_Conn_RapidConnectDisconnect
tests.description: Rapid repeated connect/disconnect cycles for resource leak detection

tests.name: NetIB_Mem_RegisterHost
tests.description: Register host memory buffers for IB RDMA

tests.name: NetIB_Mem_RegisterGpu
tests.description: Register GPU device memory buffers for IB RDMA

tests.name: NetIB_Mem_RegisterNull
tests.description: Register NULL pointer error handling

tests.name: NetIB_Mem_DeregisterNull
tests.description: Deregister NULL handle error handling

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_SimpleSendRecv
tests.description: Basic IB send/receive data transfer

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_MultipleSizes
tests.description: IB data transfer with multiple buffer sizes

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_ZeroSize
tests.description: IB zero-byte send/receive

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_LargeTransfer
tests.description: IB large buffer data transfer

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_MultipleSequential
tests.description: Multiple sequential send/recv on the same connection

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_DifferentMemoryTypes
tests.description: Send/recv with mixed host and GPU memory buffers

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_MultipleSizesFusion
tests.description: Send/recv multiple buffer sizes through fused vNIC

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_MultipleOutstanding
tests.description: Multiple outstanding send/recv requests in flight simultaneously

tests.name: NetIB_Xfer_Multidirectional
tests.description: Concurrent bidirectional transfers across multiple connections

tests.name: NetIB_Flush_AfterRecv
tests.description: GPU flush (iflush) after receive with GDR

tests.name: NetIB_VDev_MakeVirtualDevice
tests.description: Create virtual device from 2 physical IB NICs via makeVDevice(ndevs=2)

tests.name: NetIB_VDev_InvalidProps
tests.description: Reject makeVDevice with ndevs=0 (ncclInvalidUsage)

tests.name: NetIB_VDev_MergeMultipleDevices
tests.description: Merge more than two physical IB NICs into a single virtual device

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_ConnectAndTransfer
tests.description: End-to-end data transfer through fused vNIC (ndevs=2)

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_AsymmetricMerge
tests.description: Connection with mismatched ndevs (vNIC ndevs=2 vs physical ndevs=1)

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_CloseWithoutTransfer
tests.description: Clean teardown of never-used multi-PD/QP vNIC connection

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_UnalignedSizeTransfer
tests.description: Data integrity at 128-byte QP striping alignment boundaries

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_LargeTransfer
tests.description: 64MB payload striped across doubled QPs on vNIC

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_MixedSizes
tests.description: Rapid tiny/large size transitions on multi-QP vNIC path

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_Bidirectional
tests.description: Full-duplex concurrent send+recv through same fused device

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_FlushRepeated
tests.description: 50x GPU flush QP stability under repeated invocation (requires GDR)

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_SequentialTransfers
tests.description: 100x send/recv reuse on same doubled QP pool

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_Reconnect
tests.description: 10x connect/transfer/close cycles for resource leak detection

tests.name: NetIB_VNic_RegDeregCycling
tests.description: 50x regMr/deregMr cycles on multi-PD MR cache

tests.name: NetIB_MultiRecv
tests.description: irecv(n=8) batching over host memory, sequential tag order, 255 batches

tests.name: NetIB_MultiRecvShuffled
tests.description: irecv(n=8) batching over host memory, shuffled recv-slot and send-issue order, 255 batches

tests.name: NetIB_MultiRecvGPUShuffled
tests.description: irecv(n=8) batching over GPU memory (GDR path), shuffled order, 255 batches; skipped if GDR unavailable

tests.name: NetIB_CtsDepthStress
tests.description: Stress CTS match-table depth (16 P2P conns x 256 outstanding recvs) and sample hw_counters; with RCCL_IB_P2P_DISABLE_CTS=1 the workaround should keep retx/ack_timeout at 0

tests.name: Cast_EqualWeightsTwoQPsTokenCounts
tests.description: WRR token table with equal weights: verify initTotTokens=100 and per-QP token floor

tests.name: Cast_TokenSumInvariantAfterConsumption
tests.description: After 10 mid-round sends: initTokens immutable, sum(activeQpTokens)==activeTotTokens

tests.name: Cast_SplitDataThresholdBoundary
tests.description: Exact threshold boundary: size>=splitDataMin*nqps → split path (0 tokens); size<threshold → WRR path (1 token)

tests.name: Cast_EnableDisableSched
tests.description: Toggle schedEnable mid-connection: enabled=1 token, disabled=0 tokens, re-enabled=1 token

tests.name: Cast_SendRecvMultipleSizes
tests.description: Sizes across split/WRR threshold: below threshold→1 token each; at/above threshold→0 tokens; data integrity verified

tests.name: Cast_LargeTransfer
tests.description: 16 MB send with splitData=true: split path taken, 0 WRR tokens consumed, data integrity verified

tests.name: Cast_SendRecvZeroSize
tests.description: Zero-byte send: WRR oneQp path taken (dataPerQp=0 < splitDataMin), 1 token consumed, received size==0

tests.name: Cast_WeightsDistributionOneRound
tests.description: Two-phase WRR distribution: equal then triangular weights — both exhaust all active tokens after one full round

tests.name: Cast_SchedParmsReflectEnvVars
tests.description: schedParms inside sendComm matches env: schedEnable=true, doWrr=true, splitDataMin=65536

tests.name: Cast_AlternatingWrrNonWrr
tests.description: Toggle doWrr mid-connection (3×10 sends): WRR consumes tokens in phases 1&3, zero in phase 2

tests.name: Cast_EnableDisableSplitData
tests.description: Toggle splitData mid-connection at threshold boundary: WRR/split path alternates, 1/0/1 tokens consumed

tests.name: Cast_SingleQPBypassesWrr
tests.description: nqps=1: IbCastQpSchedGetEffectiveTxNqps bypasses WRR, schedInit stays false

tests.name: Cast_CursorWrapsAtNqpsBoundary
tests.description: tokens={0,...,0,1}: WRR loop skips all QPs to last, cursor wraps to 0 after selection

tests.name: Cast_FourQPsMonotonicOrder
tests.description: Triangular token weights (strictly decreasing), 100 sends: initQpTokens monotone, all active tokens exhausted

tests.name: Cast_MaxQPCount128
tests.description: 1 token per QP, nqps sends: every QP selected exactly once, cursor back to 0 after full round-robin

tests.name: Cast_StressMultiRoundTwoConns
tests.description: 5000 sends on 2 concurrent connections: timer fires mid-run, data integrity and WRR consistency invariants verified

tests.name: FaultInj_Cast_QpErrorIsFatal
tests.description: CAST path: error injected on QP 0 increments fatalErrorCount

tests.name: FaultInj_Cast_SlowQpRebalances
tests.description: CAST WRR: 10 ms delay on QP 0 causes RTT timer to reduce QP 0 active tokens below equal share after 500 sends

tests.name: FaultInj_Cast_DelayDataIntegrity
tests.description: CAST path: 2 ms per-QP delay preserves full data integrity across 50 sends

tests.name: FaultInj_Cast_SingleQpErrorIsFatal
tests.description: CAST WRR: error on one QP (tokens steered to QP 0 via SetTokens) triggers fatalErrorCount > 0 or isend failure

tests.name: FaultInj_Cast_QpErrorClearRecovers
tests.description: CAST path: after FaultClear on a faulted connection, a fresh connection completes 20 sends with no corruption and fatalCount==0

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_TagZeroReuse
tests.description: 50 messages with tag=0, verify FIFO ordering

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_FifoPressureSenderFast
tests.description: Receiver slow, sender tight loop, verify FIFO backpressure (NULL req)

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_MixedSizeBarrage
tests.description: 25 sizes from 1B to 64MB on single connection

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_RequestSlotExhaustion
tests.description: Post 32 concurrent irecvs, drain, verify recycling

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_MemoryRegistrationStorm
tests.description: 512 reg/dereg cycles in forward, reverse, shuffled order

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_ConcurrentMultiConnection
tests.description: 4 parallel connections, concurrent I/O

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_ConnectionChurn
tests.description: 1000 connect/transfer/close cycles, RDMA leak detection

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_ConnectionBatch
tests.description: 100 batches x 10 connections, RDMA checkpoints

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_BidirectionalSaturation
tests.description: Two opposing connections, full-duplex, 50 iterations

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_LongRunningEndurance
tests.description: 10000 transfers, tag cycling, RDMA checkpoints

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_GpuMemoryTransfer
tests.description: 5 GPU alloc/transfer/flush/verify/free cycles (skip if no GDR)

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_RapidRecvPostDrain
tests.description: 100 cycles of post-32-recv/drain (6400 ops)

tests.name: NetIB_Branch_InvalidRecvCount
tests.description: irecv n>8 returns ncclInternalError (net_ib.cc early-return branch)

tests.name: NetIB_Branch_MrCacheRefCount
tests.description: Double-register same buffer: refs reach 2, first dereg keeps MR, second frees it

tests.name: NetIB_Branch_SendSizeClamping
tests.description: isend with size > maxRecvs*maxSize is clamped to maxSize, data integrity verified

tests.name: NetIB_Branch_NullCommClose
tests.description: closeSend/closeRecv/closeListen on NULL comm returns ncclSuccess without crash

tests.name: NetIB_Branch_SetNetAttrNoOp
tests.description: ncclNetPlugin_v9.setAttr returns ncclSuccess for all known attribute types

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_FanIn
tests.description: Fan-in 3->1, 100 iterations, data integrity per sender

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_FanOut
tests.description: Fan-out 1->3, 100 iterations, receiver-specific patterns

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_AllToAll
tests.description: Full mesh (12 connections), 50 iterations, data integrity

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_BidirectionalMultiRank
tests.description: All pairs bidirectional, 4 ranks, 50 iterations

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_LongRunningMultiRank
tests.description: Fan-in 3->1, 1000 iterations, RDMA checkpoints

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_MultiQpSplitData
tests.description: Multi-QP split data at alignment boundaries (QPS=8, SPLIT=1)

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_MultiQpNoSplit
tests.description: Multi-QP no-split path (QPS=4, SPLIT=0)

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_MultiQpFanIn
tests.description: Multi-QP fan-in 3->1 (QPS=4, SPLIT=1)

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_ARThreshold
tests.description: Adaptive routing threshold boundary (sizes around 8192)

tests.name: NetIB_Stress_InlineSend
tests.description: CTS inline send boundary (USE_INLINE=1)

test_suites.name: NET IB - Initialization
test_suites.description: InfiniBand plugin initialization and device enumeration

test_suites.name: NET IB - Device Properties
test_suites.description: InfiniBand device property queries

test_suites.name: NET IB - Connection Setup
test_suites.description: InfiniBand listen/connect/accept and error handling

test_suites.name: NET IB - Memory Registration
test_suites.description: InfiniBand memory registration and deregistration

test_suites.name: NET IB - Data Transfer
test_suites.description: InfiniBand send/recv with various sizes

test_suites.name: NET IB - Flush
test_suites.description: InfiniBand GPU flush (iflush) with GDR

test_suites.name: NET IB - Virtual Device API
test_suites.description: makeVDevice creation and error paths

test_suites.name: NET IB - vNIC Functional
test_suites.description: Virtual NIC functional validation

test_suites.name: NET IB - vNIC Edge
test_suites.description: Virtual NIC edge case and boundary condition tests

test_suites.name: NET IB - vNIC Stress
test_suites.description: Virtual NIC stress, reconnect, and repeated-operation tests

test_suites.name: NET IB - MultiRecv
test_suites.description: irecv(n>1) multi-slot batching tests

test_suites.name: NET IB - CTS Depth Stress
test_suites.description: CTS match-table depth stress / overflow reproducer (AINIC); fully under RCCL_IB_P2P_DISABLE_CTS=1 workaround so passes cleanly on healthy stacks

test_suites.name: NET IB - CAST WRR+Split (QPS=2, splitData=1)
test_suites.description: White-box WRR scheduler tests with split-data path enabled: token counts, threshold boundary, split/WRR token accounting, sched enable/disable

test_suites.name: NET IB - CAST WRR only (QPS=2, splitData=0)
test_suites.description: White-box WRR scheduler tests without split-data: weights distribution, doWrr toggle, splitData toggle, sched parms reflection

test_suites.name: NET IB - CAST Single QP (QPS=1)
test_suites.description: WRR bypass path: single-QP connection must skip scheduler initialisation

test_suites.name: NET IB - CAST Four QPs (QPS=4)
test_suites.description: Cursor wrap and monotonic token order with up to 4 QPs

test_suites.name: NET IB - CAST Max QPs (QPS=128)
test_suites.description: Full round-robin with 1 token per QP at maximum QP count (hardware-capped)

test_suites.name: NET IB - CAST Stress (QPS=2)
test_suites.description: 5000 sends on 2 concurrent connections + large-size split-path stress (1MB/4MB/16MB × 20): RTT timer fires mid-run, consistency invariants verified

test_suites.name: NET IB - Initialization (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: InfiniBand plugin initialization and device enumeration via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - Device Properties (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: InfiniBand device property queries via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - Connection Setup (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: InfiniBand listen/connect/accept and error handling via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - Memory Registration (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: InfiniBand memory registration and deregistration via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - Data Transfer (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: InfiniBand send/recv with various sizes via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - Flush (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: InfiniBand GPU flush (iflush) with GDR via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - Virtual Device API (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: makeVDevice creation and error paths via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - vNIC Functional (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: Virtual NIC functional validation via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - vNIC Edge (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: Virtual NIC edge cases via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - vNIC Stress (ib-cast)
test_suites.description: Virtual NIC stress tests via ib-cast plugin (NCCL_NET=ib-cast)

test_suites.name: NET IB - Fault Injection (CAST path)
test_suites.description: Per-QP fault injection: error detection, WRR rebalancing under artificial delay, data integrity on CAST multi-QP path

test_suites.name: NET IB - Stress (2-rank)
test_suites.description: Resource exhaustion, connection lifecycle, endurance, bidirectional, GPU stress

test_suites.name: NET IB - Branch Coverage
test_suites.description: Targeted branch-coverage tests: irecv overflow, MR cache ref-count, send-size clamping, null-comm close, setAttr no-op

test_suites.name: NET IB - Stress (4-rank)
test_suites.description: Fan-in, fan-out, all-to-all, multi-rank endurance

test_suites.name: NET IB - Stress Multi-QP Split
test_suites.description: Multi-QP striping with split alignment boundaries

test_suites.name: NET IB - Stress Multi-QP NoSplit
test_suites.description: Multi-QP no-split (nDataQps) path

test_suites.name: NET IB - Stress Multi-QP Fan-In
test_suites.description: Multi-QP fan-in 3->1 with 4 ranks

test_suites.name: NET IB - Stress AR Threshold
test_suites.description: Adaptive routing threshold boundary tests

test_suites.name: NET IB - Stress Inline CTS
test_suites.description: CTS inline send boundary tests
